SEC appeals Ripple case ruling despite not disputing XRP sales to retail investors as securities, sparking outrage.
news.summary: The SEC is not challenging the decision that XRP sales to retail investors are not considered securities. Instead, the focus is on examining other critical elements of the case.

news.headline: Collaboration in Indonesia aims to strengthen regenerative agriculture for smallholders in palm oil industry.
news.summary: In Jakarta, Indonesia, on October 17, 2024, Musim Mas Group, Livelihoods Fund for Family Farming (L3F), SNV Indonesia, and World Agroforestry (ICRAF) have joined forces to enhance the skills and capabilities of independent oil palm smallholders. This collaboration aims to promote biodiversity and inclusivity within the industry.

World Liberty Financial will give 75% of revenue to Trump-affiliated entity and 22% of token supply, assuming no liability.
news.summary: World Liberty Financial (WLFI), a cryptocurrency platform supported by Donald Trump, plans to dedicate 75% of its protocol revenues to a company linked with the former President. According to the World Liberty Gold Paper, which has seen significant endorsement by Trump recently, almost three-fourths of its revenues could be funneled to DT Marks DEFI, LLC. The Gold Paper noted that the firm made efforts to engage owners and principals, including Trump, to promote the WLF project and allowed the use of the former President's name and likeness. In exchange for these services and rights, WLFI opted to designate 75% of its revenue to the entity. Additionally, 22.5%... (for the full story, please refer to Benzinga.com)

news.headline: China's crude oil production reaches 17.07 million tons in September, up by 1.1% year on year
China's natural gas output in September reaches 19.3bcm, up 6.8% year on year
Partnership between Microsoft and OpenAI hits a snag as negotiations on deal change show strain in their relationship.
news.summary: OpenAI, a prominent tech start-up, recently reevaluated its agreement with Microsoft, leading to a potential shift in their partnership. This move comes amidst what was once hailed as the “best bromance in tech.” The software giant has also shown signs of reevaluation, possibly aiming to diversify its investments in the start-up. This decision could impact the collaboration between the two entities significantly.

news.headline: China's stagnant growth persists as falling prices and consumer spending decline, prompting Beijing to act on the economy.
news.summary: The Chinese government is aiming to boost its economy in response to declining prices, sluggish consumer spending, and a housing market downturn. These challenges have prompted the government to implement measures to revitalize the economy.

news.headline: Offshore yuan rises further as China economic data surpass predictions
Australian dollar maintains gains following release of Chinese economic data
Financial event in Beijing to commence with key discussions on hot topics by senior officials, experts, and representatives.
news.summary: In Beijing on October 17, 2024, a highly anticipated financial event is set to kick off on Friday. This event will be attended by senior government officials, experts, scholars, and representatives from global financial institutions who will be delivering keynote speeches. This gathering is expected to draw a significant crowd and spark discussions on important financial matters, providing a platform for sharing insights and fostering collaboration.

news.headline: BRI partners with Nium for real-time cross-border payments, benefiting Indonesian customers with international transfers.
news.summary: In Jakarta, Indonesia on October 18, 2024, Nium, a prominent global platform for instant cross-border payments, has exciting news of a collaboration with Bank Rakyat Indonesia (BRI) to offer real-time overseas money transfer services to customers in Indonesia. This partnership aims to enhance the convenience and efficiency of international transactions for Indonesian customers, with the goal of providing seamless cross-border payment solutions.

Global carbon fiber market to reach $23.2 billion by 2033, growing at 12.6% CAGR driven by aerospace & automotive industries.
news.summary: The Carbon Fiber Market is expected to surge from USD 7.1 billion in 2023 to USD 23.2 billion by 2033, boasting a 12.6% CAGR by MarketsandMarkets. Growth factors include demand for lightweight materials in aerospace, industrialization, and rising incomes driving automotive industry growth. Concerns include high production costs hindering market expansion. Adoption of carbon fibers in wind and renewable energy sectors is fueling growth. 311 market tables, 32 figures, and 321 pages are present in the study. Key players include Toray Industries, Teijin Limited, and Mitsubishi Chemical Group. Drivers include rising demand for regular tow carbon in pressure vessels, with an opportunity in fuel cell electric vehicles. Challenges include producing low-cost carbon fiber. The pressure vessels segment is projected to have the highest CAGR in the market share. Lack of manufacturing technology standardization is a restraint in the market. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: TCL CSOT presents IJP OLED innovations at Omdia Korea Display Conference, focusing on strategic advantages.
news.summary: In South Korea's capital city, Seoul, on October 17, 2024, during the Omdia Korea Display Conference, Mr. Ming-Jong Jou, who serves as the Chief of the Technology Planning Center at TCL CSOT, discussed the benefits of IJP OLED technology. Mr. Jou also highlighted TCL CSOT's strategic emphasis on this technology at the event. The company's focus on IJP OLED technology remains strong, as indicated by Mr. Jou's remarks at the conference.

HISD partners with Next Level Medical for unlimited free primary, preventive, and urgent care for employees.
news.summary: In Houston on October 17, 2024, the Houston Independent School District (HISD) announced their partnership with Next Level Medical, based in Houston, to offer unlimited primary, preventive, and urgent care services to HISD employees for free using a distinctive membership system. Next Level, initially an urgent care provider, will now cater to HISD employees without any charges, marking a significant healthcare initiative in the area.

news.headline: Elevated Living rebrands to ElevateOS, a premier resident experience provider in property management, aiming to revolutionize multifamily living.
news.summary: In Chicago on October 17, 2024, Elevated Living, a leading integrated resident experience solutions provider, unveiled its rebranding as ElevateOS. This all-in-one resident operating system aims to revolutionize property management and enhance resident experiences.

news.headline: CEO Lisane Basquiat of Shaping Freedom shares solutions to tackle holiday burnout in a virtual workshop on Nov 12.
news.summary: On November 12th, Lisane Basquiat, the CEO and Founder of Shaping Freedom, is hosting a virtual workshop in Carlsbad, California to address holiday burnout. The event, titled "Freedom From Burnout," aims to equip participants with tools for stress relief and recovery. Basquiat will lead the workshop, offering solutions to combat burnout. The workshop coincides with a report from October 17, 2024, on PRNewswire-PRWeb highlighting the importance of addressing burnout during the holiday season.

news.headline: Garrison attorney search firm in DC hires Amy Savage as partner to focus on placing government attorneys and lateral partners.
news.summary: A prominent attorney search firm, Garrison, located in Washington, DC, has announced the addition of Amy Savage as a partner. Savage, a legal recruiter, will specialize in placing top-tier government attorneys in law firms and securing lateral partners. Her role will involve close collaboration with fellow legal recruiter Dan Binstock.

news.headline: G. Michelle Ferreira from Greenberg Traurig LLP to speak at UCLA Tax Controversy Conference on Oct. 24.Char: 92
news.summary: G. Michelle Ferreira, Co-Chair of the Tax Practice at Greenberg Traurig, LLP, is scheduled to deliver a talk at the upcoming UCLA Extension Tax Controversy Conference on October 24. The event is set to take place in Beverly Hills, California. This announcement was made on October 17, 2024, through a press release on PRNewswire-PRWeb.

Maxim Power Corp. repays Senior Credit Facility voluntarily in Calgary, Alberta.(TSX: MXG) announced Oct 17, 2024 - Globe Newswire.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on October 17, 2024, Maxim Power Corp. (referred to as MAXIM or the Corporation) shared that they will be voluntarily repaying outstanding amounts in the Senior Credit Facility. The repayment pertains to debts owed within the facility. Maxim Power Corp., listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol MXG, made this announcement independently.

CME Group introduces CBL Australian Carbon Credit Unit (ACCU) futures with five contracts traded initially.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, CME Group, a top derivatives marketplace, introduced its latest product, the CBL Australian Carbon Credit Unit (ACCU) futures for trading. The launch saw a significant start, with five contracts being traded as a block by Freepoint Commodities.

news.headline: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC investigates USAP, AFBI, FBMS, EVRI for violations of securities laws.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm specializing in investor rights, has begun an investigation into various companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws or fiduciary duties to shareholders. Among those under scrutiny is Universal Stainless & Alloy Products. The investigation aims to assess any violations and ensure shareholder interests are safeguarded.

news.headline: South Korea's Yoon Seok-youl's approval rating falls to 22% compared to 23% - Gallup poll
3AC embraces memecoin trend, hunts for 'racist cult leader'. Kimchi Premium now a discount, says Asia Express.
news.summary: A previously known entity, 3AC, has recently rebranded itself as Three Arrowz Capitel, a memecoin platform targeting edgelord enthusiasts. Additionally, the South Korean Kimchi Premium, which previously showcased a premium in trading prices, has now transitioned into a discounted state.

news.headline: Kyocera collaborates with ANREALAGE for Paris Fashion Week, using FOREARTH printer & MURON from recycled fishing nets.- Collaboration announced at Paris Fashion Week for Spring/Summer 2025- Features fabric made from "MURON" yarn from waste fishing nets- Printed using Kyocera's inkjet printer "FOREARTH"
news.summary: In OSAKA, Japan, Kyocera Document Solutions Inc. revealed a collaboration with fashion brand "ANREALAGE" for the Spring/Summer 2025 Paris Fashion Week®, introducing a unique item in the women's collection. The item features fabrics crafted from "MURON" yarn, produced from recycled waste fishing nets, and printed using Kyocera's inkjet textile printer "FOREARTH". The MURON yarn innovation was pioneered by MORITO APPAREL CO., LTD., headed by President Hiroyoshi Mori. This collaboration aims to showcase sustainable fashion, exemplifying environmental consciousness by repurposing materials.
